Geddy Lucier
Senior Thesis

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)


readRenviron(".Renviron") # Build API Key into your prospective .Renviron document
setwd("~/Documents/GitHub/ENVS_Seniorthesis/")
Sys.getenv("EIA_API_KEY") # Sign up with EIA to get API key for pricing data

```

```{r}
get_ng_spot <- function(series_id) {
  
  url <- "https://api.eia.gov/series/"
  
  res <- httr::GET(url, query = list(
    api_key = Sys.getenv("EIA_API_KEY"),
    series_id = series_id
  ))
  
  data_raw <- jsonlite::fromJSON(httr::content(res, "text", encoding="UTF-8"))
  
  # Return EXACT raw data frame as provided by API
  tibble::as_tibble(data_raw$series[[1]]$data)
}


```



Pull Algonquin, Henry, and Chicago Hub
```{r}
readRenviron(".Renviron")

algonquin <- get_ng_spot("NG.RNGC1.ALG.D")
henry     <- get_ng_spot("NG.RNGC1.HH.D")
chicago   <- get_ng_spot("NG.RNGC1.CHG.D")
```
